notes_detail: Date-sliced parity (OccurredDateID=20260621). Daily full-replace price fact, not an SCD. Patched proc (deterministic QUALIFY tie-break + date-scoped MERGE ON) makes all columns bit-exact including derived ConvertRateIsBuy_0/1 (diff 0E-9). Earlier 'failed' status was full-table comparison vs stale pre-patch data.
